title: U.S. and Iran Move Toward Agreement to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: President Trump has yet to sign off on an extension of the cease-fire that would allow the two sides to negotiate nuclear and other issues.
summary_public: President Trump has yet to sign off on an extension of the cease-fire that would allow the two sides to negotiate nuclear and other issues.
